General.Name: Yojee Ltd
General.Description: Yojee Limited, a logistics technology company, focuses on the freight operations. The company offers transport carrier management system platform, which enables logistics providers to consolidate supply chain networks into a single intuitive system. It also develops MOSAIC platform, a solution for freight forwarders uniting teams and partners on a single collaborative system. The company is based in West Perth, Australia.
General.Address: 50 Kings Park Road, West Perth, WA, Australia, 6005

3.Name: Mr. Nick  Zabikow
